BatchCreateRumMetricDefinitions.description: Grants permission to create rum metric definitions

BatchDeleteRumMetricDefinitions.description: Grants permission to remove rum metric definitions

BatchGetRumMetricDefinitions.description: Grants permission to get rum metric definitions

CreateAppMonitor.description: Grants permission to create appMonitor metadata

DeleteAppMonitor.description: Grants permission to delete appMonitor metadata

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy attached to an app monitor

DeleteRumMetricsDestination.description: Grants permission to delete rum metrics destinations

GetAppMonitor.description: Grants permission to get appMonitor metadata

GetAppMonitorData.description: Grants permission to get appMonitor data

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve a resource policy attached to an app monitor

ListAppMonitors.description: Grants permission to list appMonitors metadata

ListRumMetricsDestinations.description: Grants permission to list rum metrics destinations

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for resources

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to attach a resource policy to an app monitor

PutRumEvents.description: Grants permission to put RUM events for appmonitor

PutRumMetricsDestination.description: Grants permission to put rum metrics destinations

UpdateAppMonitor.description: Grants permission to update appmonitor metadata

UpdateRumMetricDefinition.description: Grants permission to update rum metric definition

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed the request on behalf of the IAM principal

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource that make the request on behalf of the IAM principal

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request on behalf of the IAM principal
